records.m_Talk_ENG: Power restoration complete... Autopilot system activated...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Power restoration complete... Autopilot system activated...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Power restoration complete... Autopilot system activated...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dimensional strata entry successful...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dimensional strata entry successful...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dimensional strata entry successful...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Inhale*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Inhale*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Inhale*

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Exhale*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Exhale*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Exhale*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness I don't have additional windpipes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness I don't have additional windpipes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness I don't have additional windpipes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're in the clear, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're in the clear, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're in the clear, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. We were caught in the aftermath of the explosion, but we managed to escape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. We were caught in the aftermath of the explosion, but we managed to escape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. We were caught in the aftermath of the explosion, but we managed to escape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we don't know where we're headed, since we punched in the coordinates from the abandoned hospital in a hurry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we don't know where we're headed, since we punched in the coordinates from the abandoned hospital in a hurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we don't know where we're headed, since we punched in the coordinates from the abandoned hospital in a hurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It took exactly 5 minutes. I thought they'd give us some slack.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It took exactly 5 minutes. I thought they'd give us some slack.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It took exactly 5 minutes. I thought they'd give us some slack.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They pretended to be friendly, but maybe they just wanted to get rid of us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They pretended to be friendly, but maybe they just wanted to get rid of us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They pretended to be friendly, but maybe they just wanted to get rid of us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, we did escape in one piece thanks to the dimension jump working well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, we did escape in one piece thanks to the dimension jump working well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, we did escape in one piece thanks to the dimension jump working well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should really learn how to stay positive like you, Boss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should really learn how to stay positive like you, Boss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should really learn how to stay positive like you, Boss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is true that she threatened our lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is true that she threatened our lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is true that she threatened our lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's because of your outstanding character that you didn't criticize the enemy and tried to understand their intentions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's because of your outstanding character that you didn't criticize the enemy and tried to understand their intentions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's because of your outstanding character that you didn't criticize the enemy and tried to understand their intentions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arrived at the designated coordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arrived at the designated coordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arrived at the designated coordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: 3 minutes remaining until dive out...
records.m_Talk_DEU: 3 minutes remaining until dive out...
records.m_Talk_FRA: 3 minutes remaining until dive out...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have a question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have a question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have a question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's under that Ground Zero place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's under that Ground Zero place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's under that Ground Zero place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It isn't as dangerous as the other Crevices, but Ground Zero is similar by definition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It isn't as dangerous as the other Crevices, but Ground Zero is similar by definition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It isn't as dangerous as the other Crevices, but Ground Zero is similar by definition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Grand Dimension Crevice is a location that poses the greatest threat to humanity as it is where the Normalside and the Counterside come into direct contact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Grand Dimension Crevice is a location that poses the greatest threat to humanity as it is where the Normalside and the Counterside come into direct contact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Grand Dimension Crevice is a location that poses the greatest threat to humanity as it is where the Normalside and the Counterside come into direct contact.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the remaining six Crevices, Ground Zero is the first that was successfully sealed when the Administration still existed.

records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's crawling with C.O.s here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's crawling with C.O.s here.

records.m_Talk_DEU: This world wasn't a wasteland from the beginning.
